ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "streetaddress" TEXT /* Street address of the resource */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the resource is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the resource is located */,
  "amenityfeatures" TEXT /* Amenities and features offered by the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., bar, club, organization) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the resource was established */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the resource */,
  "dateadded" TEXT /* Date the resource was added to the directory */,
  "lastmodified" TEXT /* Date the resource was last modified */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the resource's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours */,
  "accepts_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource accepts anonymous visits */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource has been verified by the organization */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the resource */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID for hierarchical categorization */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity (e.g., Accessibility, Entertainment) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL or path to an icon representing the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_amenities" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the amenity has been verified by the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review has been verified by the organization */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review was posted anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON object storing user privacy settings */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has been verified by the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource associated with this location */,
  "streetaddress" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "geoAddress" TEXT /* Geographic address of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geolocation data */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date the location was last verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource associated with this status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the status update has been verified by the organization */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the status update */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date the status update was verified */,
  "status_message" TEXT /* Additional message or notes about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_status_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_status_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
